body.title: CLOSED: swarm web server — all 7 areas complete
body.result: all 7 areas complete: identity-layer, channel-mechanism, visibility-rules, notification-rule, tmux-face, web-tab-ui, port-audit
body.description:
Captured design exists at lab/design_docs/datacenter-swarm-bus-design-2026-05-01.md (Akien + CC, 2026-05-01). The 7-area "sprint-ready outline" at the bottom of that doc IS the work decomposition — no further design call needed. File children for each area as they become work-ready.

## Sprint approach (CC reminder 2026-05-03)

DO NOT re-flag this as design-blocked. The design conversation happened, the doc captured it, the 7 areas are the spawn map. When sprinting:
1. Pick a child area to ship (port-use audit is the most concrete starting point).
2. File a child ticket for that area citing the design doc § as the spec.
3. Sprint the child.
4. Repeat with the next area when ready.

The seven areas (per design doc § What this becomes):
1. Identity layer — `<box>.<n>` addressing with surfaces (/console, /mcp, /inference, ...). Backward-compat alias for existing comms://<lineage>.
2. Channel mechanism — multi-party-rooms-as-mirrored-inboxes; send-to-channel splits + delivers; per-participant transport adapter forwards.
3. Visibility rules — primary-everywhere, secondary-opt-in. `shared` always present. Web UI = horizontal tabs.
4. Notification rule — intent-to-address-only, not ambient-stream.
5. Tmux face — capture-pane (preferring JSONL transcripts) → shim parse → bus envelopes; bus envelopes → shim → send-keys with attribution.
6. Web server tab UI — rendering channel streams; bidirectional input from the web.
7. Port-use audit — enumerate current bindings (UC web server, Discord bridge, Matter shelf, SensorTree, tailnet bindings, CC dashboard) and rationalize them under the unified bus.

## Companion tickets filed earlier (2026-05-01)

- T-inference-migrate-igor-to-datacenter-device (M, claude) — first concrete capability extraction
- T-capability-extraction-from-igor (XL, epic, claude) — umbrella for the broader extraction
- T-claudeandakien-workshop-evolution updated with cross-project-lab framing

## Provenance

Akien 2026-04-20 side-note during workflow-overhaul sprint. Deferred until current batch wraps. Design captured 2026-05-01. Akien call 2026-05-03 to remove the "open a /design block" framing that tripped CC twice into surfacing this as a design block.
